comment: AWS Batch job definition template for the backdoor sweep. Replace ACCOUNT, REGION, the ECR image, the job role, and the S3 bucket, then register with: aws batch register-job-definition --cli-input-json file://batch_job_definition.json

command: aws s3 sync s3://YOUR_BUCKET/celeba /data/celeba && CASE=$((AWS_BATCH_JOB_ARRAY_INDEX + 1)) && python solution/sweep.py --data-root /data/celeba --case $CASE && aws s3 cp solution/directions/case_${CASE}.pt s3://YOUR_BUCKET/directions/case_${CASE}.pt && aws s3 cp solution/directions/valset_case_${CASE}.pt s3://YOUR_BUCKET/directions/valset_case_${CASE}.pt && aws s3 cp solution/directions/sweep_results_case_${CASE}.json s3://YOUR_BUCKET/directions/sweep_results_case_${CASE}.json
